meta.title: The Marines want to make the MQ-9 a stealth aircraft?
meta.description:
The General Atomics MQ-9 Reaper has proven its value as an ISR and attack aircraft over more than 23 years of service. Now, as the U.S. Marine Corps ramps up its own Reaper fleet, the Corps wants to use cutting-edge spoofing technology to make the MQ-9 much more survivable in contested airspace. 

Let's talk about how they plan to do that.
